_comment: INTENTIONAL TEST DATA. Each entry below trips a different ValidationReport category so the end-of-load summary lists every kind: duplicate id, unknown kind, unknown template, unknown field, coercion failure, and a raw custom-band id on a content-id field (an UNBACKED synthetic id, caught as a dangling reference). The named dangling-reference category is also covered by 'sampledata_does_not_exist' in a_thief_class.json; the malformed-file category by broken.json. None of these register their intended state; they only prove fault isolation never blocks the good entries. The 'sampledata_zzz_rawid_class' id sorts AFTER 'sampledata_thief' so it never shifts the thief's positional class index.

entries.displayName: Duplicate id (same as proficiencies.json -> error, second skipped)
Raw custom-band id on a content-id field -> unbacked dangling reference, skipped
